pi_items.source: setup_task.sh TASK_ORK variable combined with task_utils.sh ROCKETS_DIR
verifier.py target_alt default logic matching task.json description target apogee of 3048 meters
verifier.py min_sims default logic and 50 pts scoring condition
verifier.py min_motors default logic and 50 pts scoring condition

privileged_info_summary: The task requires a parametric motor sweep on a provided OpenRocket file (simple_model_rocket.ork, located at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/motor_sweep.ork). The verifier explicitly requires at least 7 successful simulations testing a minimum of 4 distinct motor designations. Results must be exported to a CSV file (/home/ga/Documents/exports/motor_comparison.csv) and a written recommendation report must be generated (/home/ga/Documents/exports/motor_selection_report.txt). The best simulation must reach within 30% of the 3048-meter target altitude for full points. The source rocket 'simple_model_rocket.ork' is a real example file distributed with OpenRocket (designed by Sampo Niskanen). It is a small 18mm model rocket, creating a paradox as reaching 3048m with this model will require radically redesigning it or putting an impossibly large motor into its tiny 18mm tube. The total pass threshold is 60 out of 100 points.
